description: This file contains Balanda present simple negative modal questions using 'mamve'. These sentences express present inability or impossibility in interrogative form and correspond to the English meaning 'cannot' or 'can’t'.

question_form.notes: Negative questions are formed by adding the sentence-final question particle 'we?' to the negative modal clause

constraints.structure: mamve replaces nonve in negative modality; mamve must immediately follow the subject; The verb must remain in its base form; No ti- (continuous) or le- (future) prefix may appear; gba must appear before the question particle; No inversion or auxiliary movement occurs in questions; we? must always appear at the end of the clause; This construction must not be confused with present continuous negative modal questions (mamve + dho + ti-VERB + gba + we?)

input: Ne mamve ja nza gba we?
Ne mamve nzü ngo gba we?
Ni mamve teli gba we?
Ne mamve yai a Wau gba we?
Ni mamve dhii agbi tiyi gba we?
output: Can't he come to the house?

input: Wiki mamve nono gbi difo gba we?
output: Can't the child walk in the compound?

input: Ni mamve mande gbi njü gba we?
output: Can't he work in the garden?

input: Danda mamve moliki gba we?
Ne mamve merego ŋo gba we?
Ne mamve ŋiyi sereso gba we?
Ni mamve terei gba we?
Ne mamve we ndi gba we?
Ni mamve vele takoni gba we?
Ne mamve baha ŋo gba we?
Ni mamve dhi gba we?
Ne mamve sudi kitab gba we?
Ni mamve dheke kitab gba we?
Ne mamve sïhï kese gba we?
Ni mamve sadi nza gba we?
Ne mamve turu linguu gba we?
Ni mamve zaka kporo gba we?
Ni mamve kara kafa gba we?
Ne mamve keye ti ndi gba we?
Danda mamve wofo takoni gba we?
Ni mamve kolo wiki gba we?
Ndi mamve mago gba we?
Ni mamve vanda wiki gba we?
Ni mamve teta gba we?
Ni mamve girri gba we?
Nguu mamve vere gba we?
Maraya mamve deye gba we?
Wiki mamve rengo gba we?
Ni mamve dho gbi tiyi gba we?
output: Can't he be in the house?

input: Ne mamve ma nde gba we?
Ne mamve wala gbi Wau gba we?
Ne mamve duru ngo gba we?
Ni mamve düŋü kpendii gba we?
Ni mamve base gba we?
Ni mamve dulu gba we?
Ne mamve loro kananje gba we?
